user.title: Set up Mini Screen ESP32
user.description: Enter the details for your Mini Screen ESP32 device. The integration will verify that the device is reachable before saving.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this device (e.g. "Mini Screen").
data_description.ip_address: The local IP address of the ESP device (e.g. 192.168.1.50).

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the device at that IP address. Make sure the device is powered on and connected to your network, then try again.
error.already_configured: A Mini Screen ESP32 device with this IP address is already configured.

user.title: Add monitored sensor
user.description: Configure a sensor to show on the display when its value exceeds the threshold.

data_description.label: Label shown above the progress bar. Defaults to the entity name.
data_description.min_value: Sensor value that maps to 0 % on the bar.
data_description.max_value: Sensor value that maps to 100 % on the bar.
data_description.value_type: Show percentage or the raw sensor value below the bar.
data_description.unit: Unit suffix for raw value display. Leave blank to use the entity's own unit.
data_description.threshold: The bar blinks when the value reaches or exceeds this threshold (as a %). Set to 0 to always show without alert.
data_description.value_font_size: Font size for the value text shown below the bar.

reconfigure.title: Edit monitored sensor
reconfigure.description: Update the settings for this monitored sensor.

data_description.label: Label shown above the progress bar. Defaults to the entity name.
data_description.min_value: Sensor value that maps to 0 % on the bar.
data_description.max_value: Sensor value that maps to 100 % on the bar.
data_description.value_type: Show percentage or the raw sensor value below the bar.
data_description.unit: Unit suffix for raw value display. Leave blank to use the entity's own unit.
data_description.threshold: The bar blinks when the value reaches or exceeds this threshold (as a %). Set to 0 to always show without alert.
data_description.value_font_size: Font size for the value text shown below the bar.

init.title: Mini Screen ESP32 Settings
init.description: Update the IP address, configure the auto-dim schedule, or enable sensor monitoring.

data_description.ip_address: The local IP address of the ESP device (e.g. 192.168.1.50).
data_description.dim_start: Time to dim the display each day, 24-hour format (e.g. 22:00).
data_description.dim_end: Time to restore full brightness each day, 24-hour format (e.g. 07:00).
data_description.dim_level: Brightness level during the dim period.
data_description.dim_restore_level: Brightness level to restore after the dim period.
data_description.monitor_enabled: Cycle through monitored sensors when any threshold is exceeded. Add sensors using the + button on the device page.
data_description.monitor_interval: How long each sensor is shown before rotating to the next (1–300 s).

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the device at the new IP address. Make sure the address is correct and the device is online.
